name: observata/section-partnership
title: Section Partnership
description: Partnership journey with gradient swoosh background and 2-phase journey cards.

introText.default: We enter long-term alliances where your success is directly tied to ours. This means acting as a permanent extension of your team — proactively evolving your platform as your business grows.

phase1Text1.default: Migrate from your current observability tool to Elastic at no extra cost.

phase1Text2.default: Our experts will audit your current set-up and optimise for success.

phase2Text1.default: Once your environment is implemented and optimised, you'll move into Observata's continuous elevation of your observability. This is where the real value lives.

phase2Text2.default: Our experts will audit your current set-up and optimise for success.
